text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "ntdsutil.exe was used with the 'ifm create full' command to extract the Active Directory database (NTDS.dit) and registry hive to a temporary directory (C:\\Windows\\Temp\\ntds_T1003), which is a common technique for OS credential dumping (T1003.003).",
  "indicators": [
    "ntdsutil.exe",
    "ifm",
    "create full",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\",
    "credential dumping",
    "T1003.003"
  ]
}
